---
title: "Stella Symonds"
image: media/headshot.png
2toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/stella-symonds/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/stellassymonds
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:stella.symonds@gmail.com
---

Hi! My name is Stella Symonds and I am in my third year at UCSB pursuing a B.S. in Environmental Studies with a concentration in Statistics.
